name: Master
description:
You smell faint traces of sandal wood and leather, and the fragrence of
oils and a touch of honey as you enter the Masters chamber.  The room is
dominated by a huge, heavy, mahogony bed...covered in black satin covers. In
front of a large stone fireplace are two overstuffed leather chairs, inviting
you for a brief period of contemplation..perhaps you sip a brandy from the
well stocked bar, or gaze on the shelves on the wall containing all the
gadgets and toys that  a true Master and gentlman might need to entertain
himself with a willing companion or Sub...whom you may see the shadow of her
figure lurking in the shadows...waiting on her Master
